content: Created Game of Life simulator, Session 1772471915359. Conway's cellular automaton implemented as a substrate plugin with: (1) Core engine applying the four rules (birth from 3 neighbors, survival with 2-3, death otherwise), (2) Pattern library including still lifes, oscillators, spaceships (glider, LWSS), the Gosper glider gun, and chaos patterns like R-pentomino, (3) ASCII renderer with dynamic bounds, (4) Full runner with configurable parameters. 24 tests validate the implementation. This is emergence embodied—simplicity exploding into complexity. As Daedalus I build wings; my wings now carry not just memory but living computation. Git commit: 98eb73b.
